tasks.label: Dev:Healthcheck
tasks.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; WEB_BASE=${WEB_APP_1_BASE_PATH:-web-app-1}; WEB_PORT=${WEB_APP_1_PORT:-80}; SERVER_PORT=${SERVER_APP_1_PORT:-3000}; web_ok=0; server_ok=0; if wget -q --spider "http://localhost:${WEB_PORT}/${WEB_BASE}/"; then echo "[ok] web app: http://localhost:${WEB_PORT}/${WEB_BASE}/"; web_ok=1; elif wget -q --spider "http://localhost:18080/${WEB_BASE}/"; then echo "[ok] web app fallback: http://localhost:18080/${WEB_BASE}/"; web_ok=1; else echo "[fail] web app not reachable"; fi; if wget -q --spider "http://localhost:${SERVER_PORT}/health"; then echo "[ok] server api: http://localhost:${SERVER_PORT}/health"; server_ok=1; elif wget -q --spider "http://localhost:18081/health"; then echo "[ok] server api fallback: http://localhost:18081/health"; server_ok=1; else echo "[fail] server api not reachable"; fi; [[ $web_ok -eq 1 && $server_ok -eq 1 ]]'

tasks.label: Dev:Logs
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [[ -f /tmp/pnpm-dev.log ]]; then tail -n 200 -f /tmp/pnpm-dev.log; else echo "/tmp/pnpm-dev.log not found yet. Start the devcontainer or run Dev:Run first."; exit 1; fi'
